zh.lifeSummary: 當Iorwerth Fychan ab Iorwerth Gam於1200年出生在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾可德 奧雷德時，他的父親Iorwerth Gam ab Owain31歲，母親Angharad ferch Gruffudd25歲。他和Catrin ferch Gruffydd至少有2個兒子。他去世於從1270年1月8日到1271年1月7日在英國威爾斯丹比爾利朗勒朋維。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Iorwerth Fychan ab Iorwerth Gam于1200年出生在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾可德 奧雷德时，他的父亲Iorwerth Gam ab Owain31岁，母亲Angharad ferch Gruffudd25岁。他和Catrin ferch Gruffydd至少有2个儿子。他去世于从1270年1月8日到1271年1月7日在英国威尔斯丹比爾利朗勒朋維。

nameMeanings.name: Gam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Danish: possibly from a German noble name von Gamm from Mecklenburg (see Gamm ).
Indian (Karnataka): name of unexplained etymology found in the Koli people (a fishing community).

variants.name: Gamm
meanings: habitational name from Gamme, near Hamburg.
from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name based on an element cognate with Old High German gaman ‘joy, fun, game’.

nameMeanings.name: Iorwerth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from iōr‘ ‘lord’ + a mutated form of berth ‘handsome’; borne in the Mabinogi by the jealous brother of Madawg , son of Maredudd . Iorwerth came to be regarded as a Welsh equivalent of Edward , but it has no actual connection with that name.

variants.name: Yorath
meanings: Anglicized form of   Iorwerth   or, in some cases, a transferred use of the surname derived from it.

nameMeanings.name: Fychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

nameMeanings.name: ab
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Mabel .   See also  Maeve .

en.lifeSummary: When Iorwerth Fychan ab Iorwerth Gam was born in 1200, in Coed Aughred, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Iorwerth Gam ab Owain, was 31 and his mother, Angharad ferch Gruffudd, was 25. He had at least 2 sons with Catrin ferch Gruffydd. He died from 8 January 1270 to 7 January 1271, in Pengwern, Llangollen, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Iorwerth Fychan ab Iorwerth Gam est né en 1200, à Coed Aughred, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Iorwerth Gam ab Owain, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Angharad ferch Gruffudd, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Catrin ferch Gruffydd. Il est décédé du 8 janvier 1270 au 7 janvier 1271, à Pengwern, Llangollen, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Iorwerth Fychan ab Iorwerth Gam è nato il nel 1200 nel Coed Aughred, Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Iorwerth Gam ab Owain, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Angharad ferch Gruffudd, aveva 25 anni. ja.lifeSummary: Iorwerth Fychan ab Iorwerth Gamが1200年にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアコエド アウレドで生まれた時，父Iorwerth Gam ab Owainは31歳，母Angharad ferch Gruffuddは25歳であった。彼はCatrin ferch Gruffyddとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼はから1270年1月8日まで1271年1月7日にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアランゴレンペングウエルンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Iorwerth Fychan ab Iorwerth Gam(이)가 1200년 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 코드 오그h레드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Iorwerth Gam ab Owain(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Angharad ferch Gruffudd(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Catrin ferch Gruffydd(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1270년 1월 8일부터 1271년 1월 7일까지 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르 랭렌 펜그워에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Iorwerth Fychan ab Iorwerth Gam родился в 1200 г. в местности коед аугред, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Iorwerth Gam ab Owain было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Angharad ferch Gruffudd, 25. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Catrin ferch Gruffydd. Он умер с 8 января 1270 по 7 января 1271 в местности пэнгвирн, лланголлен, денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания.
